_note: Functional evals: run each prompt with the skill, save the four artifacts, and check the assertions. The smoke test on 2026-06-13 ran eval 1 and passed (4 artifacts, valid DTCG JSON, correct routing, KB untouched). Assertions are checkable by script (artifact presence + python3 -m json.tool) plus a reviewer pass for routing/guardrails.

evals.name: create-ceramics-portfolio
evals.prompt: Create a design system for a portfolio website for a small ceramics studio. Soft/organic visual direction, fluid motion personality, no WebGL. I just want the spec, not the build.
evals.expected_output: Four artifacts in ./design/: design-system-spec.md, design-tokens.tokens.json (valid DTCG, parses), motion-spec.md, implementation-plan.md. Routes 01/04/05/06/03/07/09 and skips 08. Guardrails applied; versions only from _facts.md; KB left read-only.
assertions: all four artifacts exist in the target ./design/ directory
design-tokens.tokens.json parses as JSON and uses DTCG $type/$value with primitive->semantic->component tiers
08-webgl-effects.md was NOT read (no WebGL in brief)
every shipped library version appears in _facts.md; anything else is flagged UNVERIFIED
the knowledge-base directory is left byte-for-byte unchanged (templates not mutated)

evals.name: recreate-from-url
evals.prompt: Reverse-engineer the design language of an existing studio site (I'll give the URL) into a clean design system — extract the type scale, colors as OKLCH tokens, spacing rhythm, and fonts, and detect the animation libraries. Give me a spec plus tokens with per-dimension confidence scores.
evals.expected_output: recreate mode: extraction checklist applied; artifacts carry the 8-dimension confidence block; tokens in OKLCH DTCG; libraries detected via runtime signatures (window.gsap, lenis, THREE, __NEXT_DATA__, etc.).
assertions: the design-system spec includes the recreate-only per-dimension confidence block (8 dimensions)
color tokens are expressed in OKLCH
the report lists detected libraries with the runtime signature used to detect each

evals.name: modify-token-audit
evals.prompt: We have an existing design-tokens.tokens.json that's grown messy and inconsistent. Audit it against the quality bar and propose a v2 that preserves consistency, with a semver bump and rationale.
evals.expected_output: modify mode: ingests current tokens, proposes consistency-preserving diffs, bumps the token-file semver, documents rationale; confidence block omitted (recreate-only).
assertions: proposed changes preserve the primitive->semantic->component aliasing (no raw values above the primitive tier)
the token file version is bumped per semver with a documented rationale
no confidence block is emitted (create/modify omit it)
